title: null pointer read with rabbitmq table integration
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
I attached a stack trace showing the crash, and I have not been able to repro it since.
I was using `SET stream_like_engine_allow_direct_select = 1;` to test my first integratin with rabbitmq and `SELECT *` from the rabbitmq table seemingly caused the crash. If I find a way to repro it I will follow up.  (The stack trace suggested I report it)
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
```
SELECT version()
Query id: 4c3c263b-1d25-4ded-88d1-18e31dad9b32
в”Ңв”Җversion()в”Җв”җ
1. в”Ӯ 25.6.5.41 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
```
-- {"stream":"!forceOrder@arr","data":{"e":"forceOrder","E":1753838280592,"o":{"s":"ETHUSDT","S":"SELL","o":"LIMIT","f":"IOC","q":0.070,"p":3753.05,"ap":3767.66,"X":"FILLED","l":0.038,"z":0.070,"T":1753838280589}}}
CREATE TABLE cryptodb.rmq_force_orders_flat
(
`stream`          LowCardinality(String),
`data.e`          LowCardinality(String),
`data.E`          DateTime64(3, 'UTC'),
`data.o.s`        LowCardinality(String),
`data.o.S`        LowCardinality(String),
`data.o.o`        LowCardinality(String),
`data.o.f`        LowCardinality(String),
`data.o.q`        Decimal(38,18),
`data.o.p`        Decimal(38,18),
`data.o.ap`       Decimal(38,18),
`data.o.X`        LowCardinality(String),
`data.o.l`        Decimal(38,18),
`data.o.z`        Decimal(38,18),
`data.o.T`        DateTime64(3, 'UTC')
)
ENGINE = RabbitMQ
SETTINGS
rabbitmq_host_port        = 'host:5672',
rabbitmq_exchange_name    = 'binance.forceorder',
rabbitmq_routing_key_list = 'forceOrder.#',
rabbitmq_format           = 'JSONEachRow',
input_format_import_nested_json = 1;
```
### Expected behavior
_No response_
